title: pinaropappus powellii
intro: Pinaropappus powellii, also known as Powell's needle-plant, is a small, shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pinaropappus powellii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing. Pinaropappus powellii can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
